scripts.invocations: AWS_PAGER='' aws cloudwatch get-metric-statistics --namespace AWS/Lambda --metric-name Invocations --dimensions Name=FunctionName,Value=$(aws lambda list-functions --query 'Functions[?contains(FunctionName, `WindAlertStack-WindAlertFunction`)&&!contains(FunctionName, `LogRetention`)].FunctionName' --output text) --start-time $(date -u -v-7d +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) --end-time $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) --period 3600 --statistics Sum --query 'sort_by(Datapoints, &Timestamp)[*].{Time:Timestamp,Count:Sum}'
scripts.errors: AWS_PAGER='' aws logs filter-log-events --log-group-name /aws/lambda/$(aws lambda list-functions --query 'Functions[?contains(FunctionName, `WindAlertStack-WindAlertFunction`)&&!contains(FunctionName, `LogRetention`)].FunctionName' --output text) --start-time $(($(date +%s) - 604800))000 --filter-pattern '?ERROR ?Error ?error' --query 'events[*].message' --output text
